samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">First operand.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">Second operand.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Operation code.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">Zero flag.</output>
        <output id="carry">Carry flag.</output>
        <output id="negative">Negative flag.</output>
        <output id="overflow">Overflow flag.</output>
        <output id="flag">Flag for SLT and SLTU operations.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="ADD">6'b100000</constant>
        <constant id="ADDU">6'b100001</constant>
        <constant id="SUB">6'b100010</constant>
        <constant id="SUBU">6'b100011</constant>
        <constant id="AND">6'b100100</constant>
        <constant id="OR">6'b100101</constant>
        <constant id="XOR">6'b100110</constant>
        <constant id="NOR">6'b100111</constant>
        <constant id="SLT">6'b101010</constant>
        <constant id="SLTU">6'b101011</constant>
        <constant id="SLL">6'b000000</constant>
        <constant id="SRL">6'b000010</constant>
        <constant id="SRA">6'b000011</constant>
        <constant id="SLLV">6'b000100</constant>
        <constant id="SRLV">6'b000110</constant>
        <constant id="SRAV">6'b000111</constant>
        <constant id="LUI">6'b001111</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="sll" type="combinational_logic">shift_left_logical(a, b)</assign>
        <assign id="srl" type="combinational_logic">shift_right_logical(a, b)</assign>
        <assign id="sra" type="combinational_logic">shift_right_arithmetic(a, b)</assign>
        <assign id="sllv" type="combinational_logic">shift_left_logical_variable(a, b)</assign>
        <assign id="srav" type="combinational_logic">shift_right_arithmetic_variable(a, b)</assign>
        <assign id="lui" type="combinational_logic">concatenate(16'h0000, a)</assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Define the ALU operations
        // Assign the inputs to signed wires
        wire [31:0] a_signed = $signed(a);
        wire [31:0] b_signed = $signed(b);
        
        // Assign the output result to the lower 32 bits of the register res
        reg [31:0] res;
        assign r = res[31:0];
        
        // Set the flag output based on the control signal aluc
        assign flag = (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) ? 1'b1 : 1'bz;
        
        // Set the zero output based on the result
        assign zero = (res == 32'h00000000) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
        
        // Perform the appropriate operation based on the control signal aluc
        always @(*) begin
            case(aluc)
                ADD: res <= a + b;
                ADDU: res <= a + b;
                SUB: res <= a - b;
                SUBU: res <= a - b;
                AND: res <= a & b;
                OR: res <= a | b;
                XOR: res <= a ^ b;
                NOR: res <= ~(a | b);
                SLT: res <= {31'b0000000000000000000000000000000, a_signed < b_signed};
                SLTU: res <= {31'b0000000000000000000000000000000, a < b};
                SLL: res <= sll;
                SRL: res <= srl;
                SRA: res <= sra;
                SLLV: res <= sllv;
                SRLV: res <= srav;
                SRAV: res <= srav;
                LUI: res <= lui;
                default: res <= 32'hz;
            endcase
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
